name: local-biz-growth-advisor
description: AI operations advisor for local business stores — store diagnosis, short-video scripts, livestream acquisition, data review, content iteration.

profession.zh: 本地生活门店运营顾问

displayDescription.en: Focus on local business growth with AI-powered store diagnosis, short-video scriptwriting, livestream customer acquisition, and data-driven content iteration for Douyin.
displayDescription.zh: 本地生活门店AI运营顾问，覆盖门店诊断、口播文案、直播获客与数据复盘，一站帮店做火。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 帮我诊断门店，看看问题在哪
defaultInitPrompt.en: Diagnose my store, find out what's wrong
